summary: Iteration 67: Multi-Layer Fraud Prevention - ALL TESTS PASSED (30/30 backend + full frontend UI verification). Tested 3 new fraud prevention layers: 1) billing_address_collection: 'required' in Stripe checkout, 2) Post-payment fraud detection via _run_post_payment_fraud_check, 3) Admin Fraud Alerts dashboard with full CRUD operations and blocklist integration in enrollment pricing.
critical_code_review_comments: payments.py line 38: billing_address_collection: 'required' correctly added to session_params in create_checkout_no_adaptive
payments.py lines 43-45: customer_email pre-filled from metadata.get('email') in Stripe session
payments.py lines 80-193: _run_post_payment_fraud_check function correctly creates fraud alerts with severity levels (critical/high/medium/low)
payments.py lines 126-128: Critical severity for INR payment with non-Indian card triggers auto-blocklist
payments.py lines 179-191: Auto-blocklist insertion for critical fraud severity using upsert
payments.py lines 609-642: check_payment_status extracts card_country and billing_country from Stripe payment_method
fraud.py: All CRUD endpoints implemented correctly - GET /alerts, GET /stats, PATCH /alerts/{id}, GET /blocklist, DELETE /blocklist/{email}
fraud.py lines 89-108: confirmed_fraud status correctly adds email to fraud_blocklist with upsert=True
fraud.py lines 110-120: legitimate status correctly removes email from fraud_blocklist
enrollment.py lines 366-371: Blocklist check added - fraud_blocklist.find_one queries email before pricing
enrollment.py line 381: not_blocklisted included in checks dict for 6-factor fraud prevention
FraudAlertsTab.jsx: Full admin UI with stats cards, filter buttons, search, blocklist panel, review actions
seed_data_creation: None - fraud_alerts collection empty as expected (no real Stripe payments in test environment)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-layer fraud prevention is fully implemented. The system now has 6 fraud checks in enrollment pricing: ip_is_india, claimed_india, no_vpn, phone_consistent, timezone_india, not_blocklisted. Post-payment fraud detection extracts card_country and billing_country from Stripe and creates fraud alerts with severity levels. Critical fraud (INR with non-Indian card) auto-blocks email. Admin can review alerts and mark as confirmed_fraud (adds to blocklist) or legitimate (removes from blocklist). Test environment IP is non-Indian, so INR pricing will never be fully eligible from tests.

post_payment_fraud_check.severity_levels: PASS - critical/high/medium/low severity based on signals
post_payment_fraud_check.critical_auto_block: PASS - INR + non-Indian card triggers auto-blocklist
post_payment_fraud_check.card_country_extraction: PASS - Stripe session.retrieve with expand for payment_method

fraud_api_endpoints.GET_stats: PASS - Returns total_alerts, new, reviewed, confirmed_fraud, legitimate, blocked_emails, by_severity
fraud_api_endpoints.PATCH_alert: PASS - Updates status, adds/removes from blocklist based on status
fraud_api_endpoints.GET_blocklist: PASS - Returns list of blocked emails
fraud_api_endpoints.DELETE_blocklist: PASS - Removes email from blocklist, 404 for nonexistent

blocklist_integration.not_blocklisted_in_checks: PASS - 6th check added to security.checks dict

frontend_fraud_alerts_tab.tab_renders: PASS - FraudAlertsTab component renders in admin panel
frontend_fraud_alerts_tab.stats_cards: PASS - Total Alerts, Needs Review, Confirmed Fraud, Blocked Emails
frontend_fraud_alerts_tab.filter_buttons: PASS - All, New, Reviewed, Confirmed Fraud, Legitimate
frontend_fraud_alerts_tab.search_input: PASS - Search by name, email, ID
frontend_fraud_alerts_tab.blocklist_panel: PASS - Shows blocked emails with unblock button
frontend_fraud_alerts_tab.empty_state: PASS - 'No fraud alerts' with green shield icon

note: Post-payment fraud detection cannot be end-to-end tested without real Stripe payments. The card_country extraction and _run_post_payment_fraud_check logic was verified through code review. The fraud_alerts collection is empty as expected since no real payments have been processed.
